# Klikcy

> Remote-first U.S. digital agency — websites, SEO/AEO, AI automation, e-commerce, apps, and branding.

## About

Klikcy builds fast websites, search-ready content systems, AI automations, and e-commerce experiences for businesses across the United States. We serve all 50 states remotely with honest nationwide positioning — no fake local offices.

## Main URLs

- Homepage: https://www.klikcy.com/
- All services: https://www.klikcy.com/all-services/
- Service areas (50 states): https://www.klikcy.com/service-areas/
- Contact: https://www.klikcy.com/contact/
- About: https://www.klikcy.com/about/

## Service categories

- Web Development: https://www.klikcy.com/categories/web-development/
- SEO & AEO: https://www.klikcy.com/categories/seo-aeo/
- AI Automation: https://www.klikcy.com/categories/ai-automation/
- App & Software: https://www.klikcy.com/categories/app-software/
- E-Commerce: https://www.klikcy.com/categories/ecommerce/
- Branding & Design: https://www.klikcy.com/categories/branding-design/
- Marketing & Growth: https://www.klikcy.com/categories/marketing-growth/
- Technical & Hosting: https://www.klikcy.com/categories/technical-hosting/

## Optional

Programmatic local SEO pages (state, city, service × location) include FAQ and AEO accordions on the canonical page HTML — not as separate sitemap URLs.
